189→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
191→        postStatus: PostStatus,
192→        formattedDate: String,
193→        displayName: String?,
194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,
196→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }
210→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
211→        }
212→
213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
218→        }
219→        return uiStrings
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }
227→
228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun getProgressBarState(
240→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
241→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
242→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
243→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
244→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
245→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
246→            } else {
247→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
248→            }
249→        } else {
250→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
251→        }
252→    }
253→
254→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
255→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
256→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }
290→
291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }
308→
309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }
342→
343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }
386→
387→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
392→    }

394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(
429→                when {
430→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434→                }
435→            )
436→        }
437→
438→        if (canShowViewButton) {
439→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowStats) {
443→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowCopy) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448→        }
449→
450→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451→
452→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454→        }
455→
456→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458→        }
459→
460→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461→
462→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463→    }

194→                ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, singleItemAction.buttonType.iconResId)!!,
195→                singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId
196→            )

198→        } else {

200→            menuItem.icon = emptyDrawable

207→        if (singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId > 0 &&
208→            singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId != MaterialR.attr.colorOnSurface) {
209→            val menuTitle = context.getText(singleItemAction.buttonType.textResId)
210→            val spannableString = SpannableString(menuTitle)
211→            val textColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(singleItemAction.buttonType.colorAttrId)
212→
213→            spannableString.setSpan(
214→                ForegroundColorSpan(textColor),
215→                0,
216→                spannableString.length,
217→                Spannable.SPAN_INCLUSIVE_INCLUSIVE
218→            )

220→            menuItem.title = spannableString

226→        when (progressBarUiState) {
227→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
228→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
229→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
230→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress

239→        delimiter: UiString,

241→    ) {
242→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
243→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
244→        color?.let { statusColor ->
245→            view.setTextColor(
246→                ContextCompat.getColor(
247→                    itemView.context,
248→                    statusColor
249→                )
250→            )
251→        }
252→    }

254→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
255→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
256→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
257→            return
258→        }
259→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
260→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
261→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
262→        } else {
263→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
264→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
265→                featuredImageView,
266→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
267→                imageUrl,
268→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
269→                    WordPress.getContext(),
270→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
271→                )
272→            )
273→        }
274→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
275→    }

277→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
278→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
279→        if (color != 0) {
280→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
281→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
282→        }
283→        return wrappedDrawable
284→    }

 24→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.UseCaseResult.Success
 25→import javax.inject.Inject
 26→
 27→class PaginateCommentsUseCase @Inject constructor(
 28→    paginateCommentsResourceProvider: PaginateCommentsResourceProvider
 29→) : FlowFSMUseCase<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction, PagingData,
 30→        CommentsUseCaseType, CommentError>(
 31→    resourceProvider = paginateCommentsResourceProvider,
 32→    initialState = Idle
 33→) {
 34→    @Suppress("LongMethod") // temporary suppress until we come up with better architecture for use cases
 35→    sealed class PaginateCommentsState : StateInterface<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction,
 36→            PagingData, CommentsUseCaseType,
 37→            CommentError> {
 38→        object Idle : PaginateCommentsState() {
 39→            override suspend fun runAction(
 40→                utilsProvider: PaginateCommentsResourceProvider,
 41→                action: PaginateCommentsAction,
 42→                flowChannel: MutableSharedFlow<UseCaseResult<CommentsUseCaseType, CommentError, PagingData>>
 43→            ): StateInterface<PaginateCommentsResourceProvider, PaginateCommentsAction, PagingData, CommentsUseCaseType,
 44→                    CommentError> {
 45→                val unrepliedCommentsUtils = utilsProvider.unrepliedCommentsUtils
 46→                return when (action) {
 47→                    is OnGetPage -> {
 48→                        val parameters = action.parameters
 49→                        val commentsStore = utilsProvider.commentsStore
 50→                        if (parameters.offset == 0) {
 51→                            flowChannel.emit(Loading(PAGINATE_USE_CASE))
 52→                            delay(LOADING_STATE_DELAY)
 53→                        }
 54→                        val result = if (!utilsProvider.networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 55→                            val cachedComments = if (parameters.offset > 0) {
 56→                                commentsStore.getCommentsForSite(
 57→                                    site = parameters.site,
 58→                                    orderByDateAscending = false,
 59→                                    limit = parameters.offset,
 60→                                    statuses = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses().toTypedArray()
 61→                                )
 62→                            } else {
 63→                                listOf()
 64→                            }
 65→                            CommentsActionPayload(
 66→                                CommentError(
 67→                                    GENERIC_ERROR,
 68→                                    utilsProvider.resourceProvider.getString(R.string.no_network_message)
 69→                                ), PagingData(
 70→                                    comments = cachedComments,
 71→                                    hasMore = cachedComments.isNotEmpty()
 72→                                )
 73→                            )
 74→                        } else {
 75→                            commentsStore.fetchCommentsPage(
 76→                                site = parameters.site,
 77→                                number = parameters.number,
 78→                                offset = parameters.offset,
 79→                                networkStatusFilter = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentStatus(),
 80→                                cacheStatuses = parameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses()
 81→                            )
 82→                        }
 83→
 84→                        val data = (result.data ?: PagingData.empty()).let {
 85→                            if (parameters.commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
 86→                                it.copy(comments = unrepliedCommentsUtils.getUnrepliedComments(it.comments))
 87→                            } else it
 88→                        }
 89→
 90→                        if (result.isError) {
 91→                            flowChannel.emit(Failure(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, result.error, data))
 92→                        } else {
 93→                            flowChannel.emit(Success(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, data))
 94→                        }
 95→
 96→                        Idle
 97→                    }
 98→                    is OnReloadFromCache -> {
 99→                        val parameters = action.parameters
100→                        val commentsStore = utilsProvider.commentsStore
101→
102→                        val result = commentsStore.getCachedComments(
103→                            site = parameters.pagingParameters.site,
104→                            cacheStatuses = parameters.pagingParameters.commentFilter.toCommentCacheStatuses(),
105→                            imposeHasMore = parameters.hasMore
106→                        )
107→
108→                        val data = (result.data ?: PagingData.empty()).let {
109→                            if (parameters.pagingParameters.commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
110→                                it.copy(comments = unrepliedCommentsUtils.getUnrepliedComments(it.comments))
111→                            } else it
112→                        }
113→
114→                        if (result.isError) {
115→                            flowChannel.emit(Failure(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, result.error, data))
116→                        } else {
117→                            flowChannel.emit(Success(PAGINATE_USE_CASE, data))
118→                        }
119→
120→                        Idle
121→                    }
122→                }
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    sealed class PaginateCommentsAction {
128→        data class OnGetPage(
129→            val parameters: GetPageParameters
130→        ) : PaginateCommentsAction()
131→
132→        data class OnReloadFromCache(
133→            val parameters: ReloadFromCacheParameters
134→        ) : PaginateCommentsAction()
135→    }
136→
137→    sealed class Parameters {
138→        data class GetPageParameters(
139→            val site: SiteModel,
140→            val number: Int,
141→            val offset: Int,
142→            val commentFilter: CommentFilter
143→        ) : Parameters()
144→
145→        data class ReloadFromCacheParameters(
146→            val pagingParameters: GetPageParameters,
147→            val hasMore: Boolean
148→        ) : Parameters()
149→    }

 39→private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 40→private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 41→
 42→class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 43→    @Inject
 44→    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 45→
 46→    @Inject
 47→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 48→
 49→    @Inject
 50→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 51→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 52→    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 53→
 54→    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 55→
 56→    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 57→    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 58→    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 59→    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 60→
 61→    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 62→
 63→    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 64→
 65→    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 66→
 67→    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 68→        PostListAdapter(
 69→            context = nonNullActivity,
 70→            imageManager = imageManager,
 71→            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 72→        )
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 76→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 77→        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 78→        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 79→
 80→        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 81→        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 82→
 83→        if (site == null) {
 84→            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 85→            nonNullActivity.finish()
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 90→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 91→            return null
 92→        }
 93→        return recyclerView
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 97→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 98→        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
 99→
100→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
101→            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
102→        }
103→
104→        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
105→
106→        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
107→            if (it != null) {
108→                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
109→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
115→
116→        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
117→
118→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
119→
120→        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
121→        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
122→
123→        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
124→        viewModel.start(
125→            postListViewModelConnector,
126→            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
127→            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
128→            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
129→        )
130→
131→        initObservers()
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun initObservers() {
135→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
136→            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
137→                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
138→                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
139→                }
140→                viewModel.search(it)
141→            }
142→        }
143→
144→        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
145→            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
146→        }
147→
148→        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
149→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
150→        }
151→
152→        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
153→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
154→        }
155→
156→        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
157→            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
158→        }
159→        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
160→            it?.let { index ->
161→                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
162→            }
163→        }
164→    }
165→
166→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
167→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
168→
169→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
170→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
171→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
172→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
173→
174→        val context = nonNullActivity
175→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
176→            0,
177→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
178→        )
179→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
180→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
181→        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
182→
183→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
184→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
185→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
186→                    it.isRefreshing = false
187→                } else {
188→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
189→                }
190→            }
191→        }
192→        return view
193→    }
194→
195→    /**
196→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
197→     *
198→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
199→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
200→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
201→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
202→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
203→     *
204→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
205→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
206→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
207→     * after changes are reflected.
208→     */
209→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
210→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
211→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
212→        recyclerView?.post {
213→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
214→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
215→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
222→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
223→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
224→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
225→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
226→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
227→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
228→            } else {
229→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
230→            }
231→        }
232→    }
233→
234→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
235→        buttonView: Button,
236→        text: UiString?,
237→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
238→    ) {
239→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
240→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
241→    }
242→
243→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
244→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
245→    }
246→
247→    companion object {
248→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
249→
250→        @JvmStatic
251→        fun newInstance(
252→            site: SiteModel,
253→            postListType: PostListType
254→        ): PostListFragment {
255→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
256→            val bundle = Bundle()
257→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
258→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
259→            fragment.arguments = bundle
260→            return fragment
261→        }
262→    }
263→}
264→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import androidx.lifecycle.DefaultLifecycleObserver
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  9→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 10→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.EventBus
 11→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.Subscribe
 12→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode.BACKGROUND
 13→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode.MAIN
 14→import org.wordpress.android.R
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.CauseOfOnPostChanged
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.LocalOrRemoteId.LocalId
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.OnMediaChanged
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.OnMediaUploaded
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore
 23→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.OnPostChanged
 24→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.OnPostUploaded
 25→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.PostDeleteActionType.DELETE
 26→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore.PostDeleteActionType.TRASH
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUploadAction.MediaUploadedSnackbar
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUploadAction.PostRemotePreviewSnackbarError
 29→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUploadAction.PostUploadedSnackbar
 30→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.PostEvents
 31→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.ProgressEvent
 32→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 33→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 34→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 35→import javax.inject.Inject
 36→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 37→
 38→/**
 39→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
 40→ * you see fit.
 41→ */
 42→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 43→class PostListEventListener(
 44→    private val lifecycle: Lifecycle,
 45→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 46→    private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 47→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 48→    private val site: SiteModel,
 49→    private val postActionHandler: PostActionHandler,
 50→    private val handlePostUpdatedWithoutError: () -> Unit,
 51→    private val handlePostUploadedWithoutError: (LocalId) -> Unit,
 52→    private val triggerPostUploadAction: (PostUploadAction) -> Unit,
 53→    private val invalidateUploadStatus: (List<Int>) -> Unit,
 54→    private val invalidateFeaturedMedia: (List<Long>) -> Unit,
 55→    private val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 56→    private val isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList: () -> Boolean,
 57→    private val hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError: () -> Boolean
 58→) : DefaultLifecycleObserver, CoroutineScope {
 59→    init {
 60→        dispatcher.register(this)
 61→        EventBus.getDefault().register(this)
 62→        lifecycle.addObserver(this)
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private var job: Job = Job()
 66→
 67→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 68→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 69→
 70→    private fun handleRemoteAutoSave(post: PostModel, isError: Boolean) {
 71→        if (isError || hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError.invoke()) {
 72→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate(
 73→                PostListRemotePreviewState.REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_PREVIEW_ERROR,
 74→                PostInfoType.PostNoInfo
 75→            )
 76→            triggerPostUploadAction.invoke(PostRemotePreviewSnackbarError(R.string.remote_preview_operation_error))
 77→        } else {
 78→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate(
 79→                PostListRemotePreviewState.PREVIEWING,
 80→                PostInfoType.PostInfo(post = post, hasError = isError)
 81→            )
 82→        }
 83→        uploadStatusChanged(post.id)
 84→        if (!isError) {
 85→            handlePostUploadedWithoutError.invoke(LocalId(post.id))
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    /**
 90→     * Handles the [Lifecycle.Event.ON_DESTROY] event to cleanup the registration for dispatcher and removing the
 91→     * observer for lifecycle.
 92→     */
 93→    override fun onDestroy(owner: LifecycleOwner) {
 94→        job.cancel()
 95→        lifecycle.removeObserver(this)
 96→        dispatcher.unregister(this)
 97→        EventBus.getDefault().unregister(this)
 98→    }
 99→
100→    /**
101→     * Has lower priority than the PostUploadHandler and UploadService, which ensures that they already processed this
102→     * OnPostChanged event. This means we can safely rely on their internal state being up to date.
103→     */
104→    @Suppress("unused", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod")
105→    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN, priority = 5)
106→    fun onPostChanged(event: OnPostChanged) {
107→        // We need to subscribe on the MAIN thread, in order to ensure the priority parameter is taken into account.
108→        // However, we want to perform the body of the method on a background thread.
109→        launch {
110→            when (event.causeOfChange) {
111→                // Fetched post list event will be handled by OnListChanged
112→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.UpdatePost -> {
113→                    if (event.isError) {
114→                        AppLog.e(
115→                            T.POSTS,
116→                            "Error updating the post with type: ${event.error.type} and" +
117→                                    " message: ${event.error.message}"
118→                        )
119→                    } else {
120→                        handlePostUpdatedWithoutError.invoke()
121→                        invalidateUploadStatus.invoke(
122→                            listOf((event.causeOfChange as CauseOfOnPostChanged.UpdatePost).localPostId)
123→                        )
124→                    }
125→                }
126→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.DeletePost -> {
127→                    val deletePostCauseOfChange = event.causeOfChange as CauseOfOnPostChanged.DeletePost
128→                    val localPostId = LocalId(deletePostCauseOfChange.localPostId)
129→                    when (deletePostCauseOfChange.postDeleteActionType) {
130→                        TRASH -> postActionHandler.handlePostTrashed(localPostId = localPostId, isError = event.isError)
131→                        DELETE -> postActionHandler.handlePostDeletedOrRemoved(
132→                            localPostId = localPostId,
133→                            isRemoved = false,
134→                            isError = event.isError
135→                        )
136→                    }
137→                }
138→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.RestorePost -> {
139→                    val localPostId = LocalId((event.causeOfChange as CauseOfOnPostChanged.RestorePost).localPostId)
140→                    postActionHandler.handlePostRestored(localPostId = localPostId, isError = event.isError)
141→                }
142→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.RemovePost -> {
143→                    val localPostId = LocalId((event.causeOfChange as CauseOfOnPostChanged.RemovePost).localPostId)
144→                    postActionHandler.handlePostDeletedOrRemoved(
145→                        localPostId = localPostId,
146→                        isRemoved = true,
147→                        isError = event.isError
148→                    )
149→                }
150→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.RemoteAutoSavePost -> {
151→                    val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(
152→                        (event.causeOfChange as CauseOfOnPostChanged.RemoteAutoSavePost).localPostId
153→                    )
154→                    if (isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList.invoke()) {
155→                        if (event.isError) {
156→                            AppLog.d(
157→                                T.POSTS, "REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_POST failed: " +
158→                                        event.error.type + " - " + event.error.message
159→                            )
160→                        }
161→                        handleRemoteAutoSave(post, event.isError)
162→                    } else {
163→                        uploadStatusChanged(post.id)
164→                    }
165→                }
166→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.FetchPages -> Unit // Do nothing
167→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.FetchPosts -> Unit // Do nothing
168→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.RemoveAllPosts -> Unit // Do nothing
169→                is CauseOfOnPostChanged.FetchPostLikes -> Unit // Do nothing
170→            }
171→        }
172→    }
173→
174→    @Suppress("unused")
175→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
176→    fun onMediaChanged(event: OnMediaChanged) {
177→        if (!event.isError && event.mediaList != null) {
178→            featuredMediaChanged(*event.mediaList.map { it.mediaId }.toLongArray())
179→            uploadStatusChanged(*event.mediaList.map { it.localPostId }.toIntArray())
180→        }
181→    }
182→
183→    @Suppress("unused")
184→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
185→    fun onPostUploaded(event: OnPostUploaded) {
186→        if (event.post != null && event.post.localSiteId == site.id) {
187→            if (!isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList.invoke() && !isRemotePreviewingFromEditor(event.post)) {
188→                triggerPostUploadAction.invoke(
189→                    PostUploadedSnackbar(
190→                        dispatcher,
191→                        site,
192→                        event.post,
193→                        event.isError,
194→                        event.isFirstTimePublish,
195→                        null
196→                    )
197→                )
198→            }
199→
200→            uploadStatusChanged(event.post.id)
201→            if (!event.isError) {
202→                handlePostUploadedWithoutError.invoke(LocalId(event.post.id))
203→            }
204→
205→            if (isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList.invoke()) {
206→                handleRemoteAutoSave(event.post, event.isError)
207→            }
208→        }
209→    }
210→
211→    @Suppress("unused")
212→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
213→    fun onMediaUploaded(event: OnMediaUploaded) {
214→        if (event.isError || event.canceled) {
215→            return
216→        }
217→        if (event.media == null || event.media.localPostId == 0 || site.id != event.media.localSiteId) {
218→            // Not interested in media not attached to posts or not belonging to the current site
219→            return
220→        }
221→        featuredMediaChanged(event.media.mediaId)
222→        uploadStatusChanged(event.media.localPostId)
223→    }
224→
225→    // EventBus Events
226→
227→    @Suppress("unused")
228→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
229→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: UploadService.UploadErrorEvent) {
230→        EventBus.getDefault().removeStickyEvent(event)
231→        if (event.post != null) {
232→            triggerPostUploadAction.invoke(
233→                PostUploadedSnackbar(
234→                    dispatcher,
235→                    site,
236→                    event.post,
237→                    true,
238→                    false,
239→                    event.errorMessage
240→                )
241→            )
242→        } else if (event.mediaModelList != null && !event.mediaModelList.isEmpty()) {
243→            triggerPostUploadAction.invoke(MediaUploadedSnackbar(site, event.mediaModelList, true, event.errorMessage))
244→        }
245→    }
246→
247→    @Suppress("unused")
248→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
249→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: UploadService.UploadMediaSuccessEvent) {
250→        EventBus.getDefault().removeStickyEvent(event)
251→        if (event.mediaModelList != null && !event.mediaModelList.isEmpty()) {
252→            triggerPostUploadAction.invoke(
253→                MediaUploadedSnackbar(site, event.mediaModelList, false, event.successMessage)
254→            )
255→        }
256→    }
257→
258→    /**
259→     * Upload started, reload so correct status on uploading post appears
260→     */
261→    @Suppress("unused")
262→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
263→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: PostEvents.PostUploadStarted) {
264→        if (site.id == event.post.localSiteId) {
265→            uploadStatusChanged(event.post.id)
266→        }
267→    }
268→
269→    /**
270→     * Upload cancelled (probably due to failed media), reload so correct status on uploading post appears
271→     */
272→    @Suppress("unused")
273→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
274→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: PostEvents.PostUploadCanceled) {
275→        if (site.id == event.post.localSiteId) {
276→            uploadStatusChanged(event.post.id)
277→        }
278→    }
279→
280→    @Suppress("unused")
281→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
282→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: ProgressEvent) {
283→        uploadStatusChanged(event.media.localPostId)
284→    }
285→
286→    @Suppress("unused")
287→    @Subscribe(threadMode = BACKGROUND)
288→    fun onEventBackgroundThread(event: UploadService.UploadMediaRetryEvent) {
289→        if (event.mediaModelList != null && !event.mediaModelList.isEmpty()) {
290→            // if there' a Post to which the retried media belongs, clear their status
291→            val postsToRefresh = PostUtils.getPostsThatIncludeAnyOfTheseMedia(postStore, event.mediaModelList)
292→            uploadStatusChanged(*postsToRefresh.map { it.id }.toIntArray())
293→        }
294→    }
295→
296→    private fun isRemotePreviewingFromEditor(post: PostModel?): Boolean {
297→        val previewedPost = EventBus.getDefault().getStickyEvent(PostEvents.PostPreviewingInEditor::class.java)
298→        return previewedPost != null && post != null &&
299→                post.localSiteId == previewedPost.localSiteId &&
300→                post.id == previewedPost.postId
301→    }
302→
303→    private fun uploadStatusChanged(vararg localPostIds: Int) {
304→        invalidateUploadStatus.invoke(localPostIds.toList())
305→    }
306→
307→    private fun featuredMediaChanged(vararg featuredImageIds: Long) {
308→        invalidateFeaturedMedia.invoke(featuredImageIds.toList())

 6→enum class CommentFilter(val labelResId: Int) {
 7→    ALL(R.string.comment_status_all),
 8→    PENDING(R.string.comment_status_unapproved),
 9→    APPROVED(R.string.comment_status_approved),
10→    UNREPLIED(R.string.comment_status_unreplied),
11→    TRASHED(R.string.comment_status_trash),
12→    SPAM(R.string.comment_status_spam),
13→    DELETE(R.string.comment_status_trash);
14→
15→    fun toCommentCacheStatuses(): List<CommentStatus> {
16→        return when (this) {
17→            ALL -> listOf(CommentStatus.APPROVED, CommentStatus.UNAPPROVED)
18→            PENDING -> listOf(CommentStatus.UNAPPROVED)
19→            APPROVED -> listOf(CommentStatus.APPROVED)
20→            UNREPLIED -> listOf(CommentStatus.APPROVED, CommentStatus.UNAPPROVED)
21→            TRASHED -> listOf(CommentStatus.TRASH)
22→            SPAM -> listOf(CommentStatus.SPAM)
23→            DELETE -> listOf(CommentStatus.DELETED)
24→        }
25→    }
26→
27→    fun toCommentStatus(): CommentStatus {
28→        return when (this) {
29→            ALL -> CommentStatus.ALL
30→            PENDING -> CommentStatus.UNAPPROVED
31→            APPROVED -> CommentStatus.APPROVED
32→            UNREPLIED -> CommentStatus.ALL
33→            TRASHED -> CommentStatus.TRASH
34→            SPAM -> CommentStatus.SPAM
35→            DELETE -> CommentStatus.DELETED
36→        }
37→    }
38→
39→    fun toTrackingLabelResId(): Int {
40→        return when (this) {
41→            ALL -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_all
42→            PENDING -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_pending
43→            APPROVED -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_approved
44→            UNREPLIED -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_unreplied
45→            TRASHED -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_trashed
46→            SPAM -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_spam
47→            DELETE -> R.string.comment_tracker_label_trashed
48→        }
49→    }

 60→private const val EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE = 250L
 61→
 62→class PostListViewModel @Inject constructor(
 63→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 64→    private val listStore: ListStore,
 65→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 66→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 67→    private val listItemUiStateHelper: PostListItemUiStateHelper,
 68→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 69→    private val uploadStarter: UploadStarter,
 70→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper,
 71→    private val uploadUtilsWrapper: UploadUtilsWrapper,
 72→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val uiDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 73→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 74→    connectionStatus: LiveData<ConnectionStatus>
 75→) : ScopedViewModel(uiDispatcher) {
 76→    private val isStatsSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 77→        SiteUtils.isAccessedViaWPComRest(connector.site) && connector.site.hasCapabilityViewStats
 78→    }
 79→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
 80→        connector.site.isWPCom &&
 81→                connector.site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts &&
 82→                !connector.site.isSingleUserSite
 83→    }
 84→    private var isStarted: Boolean = false
 85→    private lateinit var connector: PostListViewModelConnector
 86→
 87→    private var photonWidth by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 88→    private var photonHeight by Delegates.notNull<Int>()
 89→
 90→    private var scrollToLocalPostId: LocalPostId? = null
 91→
 92→    private val _scrollToPosition = SingleLiveEvent<Int>()
 93→    val scrollToPosition: LiveData<Int> = _scrollToPosition
 94→
 95→    private val dataSource: PostListItemDataSource by lazy {
 96→        PostListItemDataSource(
 97→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
 98→            postStore = postStore,
 99→            postFetcher = connector.postFetcher,
100→            transform = this::transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState
101→        )
102→    }
103→
104→    private var pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>? = null
105→
106→    private val _pagedListData = MediatorLiveData<PagedPostList>()
107→    val pagedListData: LiveData<PagedPostList> = _pagedListData
108→
109→    private val _emptyViewState = ThrottleLiveData<PostListEmptyUiState>(
110→        offset = EMPTY_VIEW_THROTTLE,
111→        coroutineScope = viewModelScope,
112→        mainDispatcher = uiDispatcher,
113→        backgroundDispatcher = bgDispatcher
114→    )
115→    val emptyViewState: LiveData<PostListEmptyUiState> = _emptyViewState
116→
117→    private val _isLoadingMore = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
118→    val isLoadingMore: LiveData<Boolean> = _isLoadingMore
119→
120→    private val _isFetchingFirstPage = MediatorLiveData<Boolean>()
121→    val isFetchingFirstPage: LiveData<Boolean> = _isFetchingFirstPage
122→
123→    private var searchQuery: String? = null
124→    private var searchJob: Job? = null
125→    private var searchProgressJob: Job? = null
126→    private lateinit var authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection
127→
128→    private val lifecycleOwner = object : LifecycleOwner {
129→        val lifecycleRegistry = LifecycleRegistry(this)
130→        override val lifecycle: Lifecycle = lifecycleRegistry
131→    }
132→
133→    fun start(
134→        postListViewModelConnector: PostListViewModelConnector,
135→        value: AuthorFilterSelection,
136→        photonWidth: Int,
137→        photonHeight: Int
138→    ) {
139→        if (isStarted) {
140→            return
141→        }
142→        this.photonHeight = photonHeight
143→        this.photonWidth = photonWidth
144→        connector = postListViewModelConnector
145→
146→        isStarted = true
147→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
148→
149→        if (connector.postListType == SEARCH) {
150→            this.authorFilterSelection = EVERYONE
151→        } else {
152→            this.authorFilterSelection = value
153→            /*
154→             * We don't want to initialize the list with empty search query in search mode as it'd send an unnecessary
155→             * request to fetch ids of all posts on the site.
156→             */
157→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
158→        }
159→    }
160→
161→    private fun initList(dataSource: PostListItemDataSource, lifecycle: Lifecycle) {
162→        val listDescriptor: PostListDescriptor = initListDescriptor(searchQuery)
163→
164→        clearLiveDataSources()
165→
166→        val pagedListWrapper = listStore.getList(listDescriptor, dataSource, lifecycle)
167→
168→        listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper)
169→
170→        _pagedListData.addSource(pagedListWrapper.data) { pagedPostList ->
171→            pagedPostList?.let {
172→                if (isSearchResultDeliverable()) {
173→                    onDataUpdated(it)
174→                    _pagedListData.value = it
175→                }
176→            }
177→        }
178→        _isFetchingFirstPage.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) {
179→            searchProgressJob?.cancel()
180→            if (it == true) {
181→                val delay = if (connector.postListType != SEARCH) {
182→                    0
183→                } else {
184→                    SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS
185→                }
186→                searchProgressJob = launch {
187→                    delay(delay)
188→                    searchProgressJob = null
189→                    if (isActive) {
190→                        _isFetchingFirstPage.value = true
191→                    }
192→                }
193→            } else {
194→                _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
195→            }
196→        }
197→        _isLoadingMore.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isLoadingMore) {
198→            _isLoadingMore.value = it
199→        }
200→
201→        this.pagedListWrapper = pagedListWrapper
202→        fetchFirstPage()
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun clearLiveDataSources() {
206→        pagedListWrapper?.let {
207→            _pagedListData.removeSource(it.data)
208→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(pagedListData)
209→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isEmpty)
210→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
211→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.listError)
212→            _isFetchingFirstPage.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
213→            _isLoadingMore.removeSource(it.isLoadingMore)
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun initListDescriptor(searchQuery: String?): PostListDescriptor {
218→        return if (connector.site.isUsingWpComRestApi) {
219→            val author: AuthorFilter = when (authorFilterSelection) {
220→                ME -> SpecificAuthor(accountStore.account.userId)
221→                EVERYONE -> Everyone
222→            }
223→
224→            PostListDescriptorForRestSite(
225→                site = connector.site,
226→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
227→                author = author,
228→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
229→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
230→            )
231→        } else {
232→            PostListDescriptorForXmlRpcSite(
233→                site = connector.site,
234→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
235→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
236→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
237→            )
238→        }
239→    }
240→
241→    private fun listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>) {
242→        val update = {
243→            createEmptyUiState(
244→                postListType = connector.postListType,
245→                isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
246→                isLoadingData = pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage.value ?: false ||
247→                        pagedListWrapper.data.value == null,
248→                isListEmpty = pagedListWrapper.isEmpty.value ?: true,
249→                isSearchPromptRequired = isEmptySearch(),
250→                error = pagedListWrapper.listError.value,
251→                fetchFirstPage = this::fetchFirstPage,
252→                newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
253→            )
254→        }
255→
256→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isEmpty) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
257→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
258→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.listError) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
259→    }
260→
261→    // used to filter out dataset changes that might trigger empty view when performing search
262→    private fun isSearchResultDeliverable(): Boolean {
263→        return connector.postListType != SEARCH ||
264→                (connector.postListType == SEARCH &&
265→                        pagedListWrapper?.isFetchingFirstPage?.value != null &&
266→                        isFetchingFirstPage.value == false)
267→    }
268→
269→    private fun isEmptySearch(): Boolean {
270→        return TextUtils.isEmpty(searchQuery) && connector.postListType == SEARCH
271→    }
272→
273→    init {
274→        connectionStatus.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
275→            retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError()
276→        })
277→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
278→    }
279→
280→    fun search(query: String?, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY_MS) {
281→        if (searchQuery == query) {
282→            return
283→        }
284→        searchJob?.cancel()
285→        searchProgressJob?.cancel()
286→        searchQuery = query
287→        if (TextUtils.isEmpty(query)) {
288→            clearLiveDataSources()
289→            pagedListWrapper = null
290→            _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
291→            showEmptySearchPrompt()
292→        } else {
293→            searchJob = launch {
294→                delay(delay)
295→                searchJob = null
296→                if (isActive) {
297→                    initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
298→                }
299→            }
300→        }
301→    }
302→
303→    private fun showEmptySearchPrompt() {
304→        _emptyViewState.value = createEmptyUiState(
305→            postListType = SEARCH,
306→            isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
307→            isLoadingData = false,
308→            isListEmpty = true,
309→            isSearchPromptRequired = true,
310→            error = null,
311→            fetchFirstPage = this@PostListViewModel::fetchFirstPage,
312→            newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
313→        )
314→    }
315→
316→    override fun onCleared() {
317→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED
318→        super.onCleared()
319→    }
320→
321→    // Public Methods
322→
323→    fun swipeToRefresh() {
324→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(connector.site)
325→        fetchFirstPage()
326→    }
327→
328→    fun scrollToPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
329→        val data = pagedListData.value
330→        if (data != null) {
331→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
332→        } else {
333→            // store the target post id and scroll there when the data is loaded
334→            scrollToLocalPostId = localPostId
335→        }
336→    }
337→
338→    // Utils
339→
340→    private fun fetchFirstPage() {
341→        pagedListWrapper?.fetchFirstPage()
342→    }
343→
344→    private fun onDataUpdated(data: PagedPostList) {
345→        val localPostId = scrollToLocalPostId
346→        if (localPostId != null) {
347→            scrollToLocalPostId = null
348→            updateScrollPosition(data, localPostId)
349→        }
350→    }
351→
352→    private fun updateScrollPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId) {
353→        val position = findItemListPosition(data, localPostId)
354→        position?.let {
355→            _scrollToPosition.value = it
356→        } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, "ScrollToPost failed - the post not found.")
357→    }
358→
359→    private fun findItemListPosition(data: PagedPostList, localPostId: LocalPostId): Int? {
360→        return data.listIterator().withIndex().asSequence().find { listItem ->
361→            if (listItem.value is PostListItemUiState) {
362→                (listItem.value as PostListItemUiState).data.localPostId == localPostId
363→            } else {
364→                false
365→            }
366→        }?.index
367→    }
368→
369→    private fun transformPostModelToPostListItemUiState(post: PostModel): PostListItemUiState {
370→        val hasAutoSave = connector.hasAutoSave(post)
371→        return listItemUiStateHelper.createPostListItemUiState(
372→            authorFilterSelection,
373→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
374→            post = post,
375→            site = connector.site,
376→            unhandledConflicts = connector.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(post),
377→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave,
378→            capabilitiesToPublish = uploadUtilsWrapper.userCanPublish(connector.site),
379→            statsSupported = isStatsSupported,
380→            featuredImageUrl =
381→            convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(connector.getFeaturedImageUrl(post.featuredImageId)),
382→            formattedDate = PostUtils.getFormattedDate(post),
383→            performingCriticalAction = connector.postActionHandler.isPerformingCriticalAction(LocalId(post.id)),
384→            onAction = { postModel, buttonType, statEvent ->
385→                trackPostListAction(connector.site, buttonType, postModel, statEvent)
386→                connector.postActionHandler.handlePostButton(buttonType, postModel, hasAutoSave)
387→            },
388→            uploadStatusTracker = connector.uploadStatusTracker,
389→            isSearch = connector.postListType == SEARCH
390→        )
391→    }
392→
393→    private fun retryOnConnectionAvailableAfterRefreshError() {
394→        val connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable() &&
395→                emptyViewState.value is RefreshError
396→
397→        if (connectionAvailableAfterRefreshError) {
398→            fetchFirstPage()
399→        }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun convertToPhotonUrlIfPossible(featuredImageUrl: String?): String? =
403→        readerUtilsWrapper.getResizedImageUrl(
404→            featuredImageUrl,
405→            photonWidth,
406→            photonHeight,
407→            SiteUtils.getAccessibilityInfoFromSite(connector.site)
408→        )
409→
410→    fun updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection): Boolean {
411→        if (connector.postListType != SEARCH && this.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
412→            this.authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection
413→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
414→            return true
415→        }
416→        return false
417→    }
418→}

 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}

43→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"

46→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"

48→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"

189→    fun copyPost(site: SiteModel, postToCopy: PostModel, performChecks: Boolean = false) {
190→        if (performChecks && (postConflictResolver.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(postToCopy) ||
191→                    postConflictResolver.hasUnhandledAutoSave(postToCopy))
192→        ) {
193→            postListDialogHelper.showCopyConflictDialog(postToCopy)
194→            return
195→        }
196→        val post = postStore.instantiatePostModel(
197→            site,
198→            false,
199→            postToCopy.title,
200→            postToCopy.content,
201→            PostStatus.DRAFT.toString(),
202→            postToCopy.categoryIdList,
203→            postToCopy.postFormat,
204→            true
205→        )
206→        _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = false))
207→    }

209→    /**
210→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
211→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
212→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
213→     * which we currently can't
214→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
215→     *
216→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
217→     */
218→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
219→        site.isWPCom && site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts && !site.isSingleUserSite

227→    fun start(
228→        site: SiteModel,
229→        initPreviewState: PostListRemotePreviewState,
230→        currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId,
231→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
232→    ) {
233→        this.site = site
234→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
235→
236→        val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
237→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection
238→        } else {
239→            AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
240→        }
241→
242→        postListEventListenerFactory.createAndStartListening(
243→            lifecycle = lifecycleOwner.lifecycle,
244→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
245→            bgDispatcher = bgDispatcher,
246→            postStore = postStore,
247→            site = site,
248→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
249→            handlePostUpdatedWithoutError = postConflictResolver::onPostSuccessfullyUpdated,
250→            handlePostUploadedWithoutError = {
251→                refreshAllLists()
252→            },
253→            triggerPostUploadAction = { _postUploadAction.postValue(it) },
254→            invalidateUploadStatus = {
255→                uploadStatusTracker.invalidateUploadStatus(it)
256→                invalidateAllLists()
257→            },
258→            invalidateFeaturedMedia = {
259→                featuredImageTracker.invalidateFeaturedMedia(it)
260→                invalidateAllLists()
261→            },
262→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate = this::updatePreviewAndDialogState,
263→            isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList = this::isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList,
264→            hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError = this::hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError
265→        )
266→
267→        _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
268→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
269→            isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(POST_LIST_PAGES.first()) &&
270→                    isSearchExpanded.value != true,
271→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
272→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection,
273→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(authorFilterSelection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
274→        )
275→        _previewState.value = _previewState.value ?: initPreviewState
276→
277→        currentBottomSheetPostId.let { postId ->
278→            if (postId.value != 0) {
279→                editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(postId.value)
280→            }
281→        }
282→
283→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
284→
285→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(site)
286→
287→        editPostRepository.run {
288→            postChanged.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
289→                savePostToDbUseCase.savePostToDb(editPostRepository, site)
290→            })
291→        }
292→    }

384→    fun showTargetPost(targetPostId: Int) {
385→        val postModel = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(targetPostId)
386→        if (postModel == null) {
387→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
388→        } else {
389→            launch(mainDispatcher) {
390→                val targetTab = PostListType.fromPostStatus(PostStatus.fromPost(postModel))
391→                _selectTab.value = POST_LIST_PAGES.indexOf(targetTab)
392→                // we need to make sure the ViewPager initializes the targetTab fragment before we can propagate
393→                // the targetPostId to it
394→                withContext(bgDispatcher) {
395→                    delay(SCROLL_TO_DELAY)
396→                }
397→                _scrollToLocalPostId.value = LocalPostId(LocalId(postModel.id))
398→            }
399→        }
400→    }

473→    /**
474→     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
475→     */
476→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
477→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
478→        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
479→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
480→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
481→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
482→    ) {
483→        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
484→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
485→        }
486→
487→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
488→            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
489→            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
490→            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
491→            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
492→        )
493→
494→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
495→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
496→
497→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
498→                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
499→                site,
500→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
501→            )
502→        }
503→    }

506→        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
507→        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListDataInvalidatedAction(listTypeIdentifier))
508→    }
509→
510→    private fun refreshAllLists() {

513→    }

515→    private fun isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList() = _previewState.value != null &&
516→            _previewState.value != PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE
517→
518→    private fun hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError() = _previewState.value != null &&
519→            _previewState.value == PostListRemotePreviewState.REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_PREVIEW_ERROR
520→
521→    private fun checkNetworkConnection(): Boolean =
522→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
523→            true
524→        } else {
525→            _toastMessage.postValue(ToastMessageHolder(R.string.no_network_message, Duration.SHORT))
526→            false
527→        }
528→
529→    fun handleRemotePreviewClosing() {
530→        updatePreviewAndDialogState(PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, PostInfoType.PostNoInfo)
531→    }
532→
533→    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
534→        // We need only transitions, so...
535→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
536→
537→        AppLog.d(
538→            AppLog.T.POSTS,
539→            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
540→        )
541→
542→        // update the state
543→        val prevState = _previewState.value
544→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
545→
546→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
547→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
548→            newState,
549→            prevState,
550→            postInfo,
551→            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
552→        )
553→    }
554→
555→    fun onBottomSheetPublishButtonClicked() {
556→        editPostRepository.getEditablePost()?.let {
557→            postActionHandler.publishPost(it)
558→        }
559→    }
560→
561→    fun refreshUiStateForAuthorFilter() {
562→        _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy()
563→    }
564→}
